title: breonia decaryana
intro: Breonia decaryana, also known as Decaryana, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Rubiaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis. Breonia decaryana can be prepared as a tea or a decoction, and it has also been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
